evaluation: official LongMemEval prompts (evaluate_qa.py get_anscheck_prompt, per-question-type yes/no, verbatim)
hypotheses_source: same answers as longmemeval-s-2026-06-15 (strict 404/500); only the judge changed
note: The LongMemEval paper's judge is a prompt-engineered GPT-4o; here the same prompts are run with gpt-5-mini. The prompts are the paper's, the judge model is not.
